description: Web-based audio circuit breadboard simulator for electronics hobbyists. Electron desktop companion available. Owned by Circuitous FX (Tim Samoff, samoff.com). Live at samoff.com/ryewired.
continuation_note: This is a design and implementation continuation. The uploaded project zip reflects the current rw8 state. All changes listed here are already applied.

design_intent.aesthetic: Dark UI with warm brown tones. The board itself is cream/ivory. Components look like real through-hole parts — resistors with color bands, electrolytic caps as circles with stripes, transistors as D-shapes or circles.
design_intent.audience: Audio electronics hobbyists building guitar effects pedals and similar circuits. The app should feel like a real breadboard, not a schematic editor.

fonts.technical: IBM Plex Mono (coordinates, IDs, component values, code)

design_intent.board_surface: Cream (#EAE5E0) with subtle column stripe dividers every 5 columns. Rail strips at top and bottom: blue row for – (GND), red row for + (VCC). Row labels a-j on left and right margins. Column numbers every 5 cols above and below the main grid.
design_intent.component_look: Real physical appearance, not schematic symbols. Resistors show color bands. LEDs glow when lit. Power supply body is split blue/red to show polarity.

repo_structure.root: repo root = web root. Served at samoff.com/ryewired. index.html is at root.
repo_structure.css/tokens.css: ALL CSS variables. Loaded via <link> tag in both app and admin HTML. Never @import — breaks in Electron file:// context.
repo_structure.js/utils.js: Global utilities: uid(prefix), clone(obj), mapRange(v,a,b,c,d), clamp(v,min,max), debounce(fn,ms).
repo_structure.js/storage.js: File System Access API with download/input fallback. loadAllComponents(), saveLayout(), openLayout(), openAudioFile(), migrateLayout(), markDirty(), updateTitle(). CRITICAL: migrateLayout() converts old inst.row/col format to inst.legs[] on load — do not remove.
repo_structure.js/components-registry.js: Loads component JSON via fetch. createInstance(defId, row, col) builds inst.legs[]. search(q) filters by label/id/description. CATEGORY_LABELS map.
repo_structure.js/board.js: The main canvas renderer and interaction engine. DPR-aware. All drawing, hit-testing, drag state machine, wire rendering.
repo_structure.js/wire.js: Jumper mode module. startOrFinish(hole), enter(), exit(), isWiring(), hasStart(), cancelCurrent(). Color cycles through WIRE_COLORS array.
repo_structure.js/simulation.js: Net-tracing behavioral solver. Union-find net map. Identifies VCC/GND nets from power supply legs. Per-component solver reads actual leg voltages from net map.
repo_structure.js/audio-engine.js: Web Audio API. start(), stop(), isRunning(), loadAudioFile(), updatePotWiper(). May be partially stubbed.
repo_structure.js/oscilloscope.js: Scope and spectrum canvas rendering. init(scopeCanvas, spectrumCanvas), start(), stop().
repo_structure.js/properties-panel.js: show(inst, wire) handles both component and wire selection. Flip button (polarized components), Rotate CW/CCW buttons (all non-IC components), rotateLeg90(inst, dir) function.
repo_structure.js/palette.js: Component list with canvas-rendered drag images. buildDragImage() uses plain 1:1 pixel canvas (NOT retina-scaled) for reliable setDragImage hotspot.
repo_structure.js/autosave.js: localStorage autosave. KEY='ryewired_autosave', META_KEY='ryewired_autosave_meta'. save() is debounced 800ms. restore() called on app init. clear() called on New/Open/Clear.
repo_structure.js/history.js: 50-step JSON snapshot undo/redo. push() after every meaningful action, calls AutoSave.save(). pushDebounced(400ms) for sliders. init() pushes empty-board snapshot. updateButtons() sets disabled on btn-undo/btn-redo.
repo_structure.js/app.js: Bootstrap, action dispatcher, zoom, pan, keyboard shortcuts, simulation start/stop, layout I/O.
repo_structure.data/components/manifest.json: Array of filenames. Auto-regenerated by admin tool on every save/delete.
repo_structure.admin/: Standalone Electron admin tool. main.js data path: ../../data/components/ relative to admin/main.js.
repo_structure.index.html: Loads scripts in this order: utils.js, storage.js, components-registry.js, board.js, wire.js, simulation.js, audio-engine.js, oscilloscope.js, properties-panel.js, palette.js, autosave.js, history.js, app.js

board_geometry.row_numbering: rows 0-4 = a-e (BOTTOM half of main grid, drawn last = lower on screen). rows 5-9 = f-j (TOP half). Rail rows use string keys: 'rtp'=top plus, 'rtm'=top minus, 'rbp'=bottom plus, 'rbm'=bottom minus.
board_geometry.internal_connections: Rows 0-4: each column is internally connected vertically (holes a-e in same column share a net). Rows 5-9: same (f-j per column). Rails: connected horizontally within each half, broken at col 31.
board_geometry.fitBoard_critical: Use parseFloat(canvas.style.width) NOT canvas.width. canvas.width is DPR-inflated (e.g. 2x on retina) and causes fitBoard to calculate ~30% zoom instead of ~60%.

component_position_model.storage: inst.legs = [{row, col}, ...] — one object per physical leg.
component_position_model.legacy_migration: storage.js migrateLayout() converts old inst.row/inst.col to legs[] on load. Checks inst.legs exists and has length > 0.
component_position_model.instGeometry_returns: { cx, cy, ang, len, pts } where cx/cy = midpoint of legs[0] and legs[last] pixels, ang = atan2(dy,dx) between them, len = pixel distance, pts = array of ALL leg pixels in world space.
component_position_model.pts_usage: pts[1] is the world-space pixel of the center leg for 3-leg components. Used in center-lead projection.
component_position_model.center_lead_projection: After ctx.translate(cx,cy); ctx.rotate(ang), world pixel pts[1] is projected into local space: dx=pts[1].x-cx, dy=pts[1].y-cy, lx=dx*cos(-ang)-dy*sin(-ang), ly=dx*sin(-ang)+dy*cos(-ang). Lead draws from body edge (bh/2 if ly>=0, else -bh/2) to (lx, ly).
component_position_model.lead_rendering: Leads ALWAYS stretch from body edge to actual leg hole pixel. No fixed lead_length gap. LEAD_COLOR='#555555', LEAD_WIDTH=2.0, LEAD_CAP_R=3.0 filled circle at each hole end.
component_position_model.drag_during_comp_drag: instGeometry(inst, useOffset=true) shifts all pts by (_dragOffsetX, _dragOffsetY) for ghost rendering during free body drag.

component_definitions.note: leg_span = distance in holes between the two OUTER legs (not total count). A transistor with 3 legs across 3 holes has leg_span=2.

resistor.body: tan rectangle with 4 color band stripes

capacitor_electrolytic.body: perfect circle, white wedge stripe on negative side, dark minus symbol in stripe

led.body: flat cathode face on LEFT, dome arc on RIGHT, white line on flat face, +/- labels inside

diode.silicon: black rounded rect + white bar on right (cathode)
diode.germanium: semi-transparent glass rect + dark bar on right

transistor_npn.silicon: black D-shape, flat face LEFT, curved right, internal B/C/E lines + emitter arrow
transistor_npn.germanium: silver radial-gradient full circle + index notch dot

potentiometer.body: filled circle with small knob circle + wiper line indicator

power_supply.body: two-tone: left half blue(–), right half red(+), voltage label centered, +/– inside each half, polarity labels drawn at lead ends in rail colors

signal_generator.body: dark rectangle with mini waveform drawn in scope-trace green

switch_spst.body: dark rectangle with toggle line, ON/OFF label in green/red

interaction_model.drag_state_machine: idle → comp-pending → comp-dragging → idle. Also: idle → leg-dragging → idle.
interaction_model.body_drag: Free pixel movement during drag (_dragOffsetX/Y). On mouseup: each leg snaps to nearest hole within DROP_SNAP_RADIUS=40px, or stays put if no hole nearby. Escape or out-of-canvas mouseup restores _savedLegs.
interaction_model.leg_drag: Outer legs only. Center leg (index 1) skipped in hitTestLeg() AND no drag handle rendered for it. Anchor = other outer leg. During drag: dragged leg tracks hoverHole, center leg auto-recomputes as midpoint hole.
interaction_model.drop_from_palette: onDrop() uses xyToHole(x, y, DROP_SNAP_RADIUS=40) — generous snap so components land on first try.
interaction_model.jumper_mode: W key toggles. Wire.enter()/exit() called from app.js. First click = Wire.startOrFinish(hole) sets start. Second click = places wire and calls History.push(). Escape with wire started = Wire.cancelCurrent(). Escape without wire started = exits jumper mode.
interaction_model.wire_selection: hitTestWire() checks point-to-segment distance < WIRE_HIT_W=7px. Selected wire shows in properties panel with color picker + Remove Jumper button.
interaction_model.rotate_button: In properties panel. rotateLeg90(inst, dir) computes new outer leg world positions at current angle ± 90°, snaps to holes, recomputes center leg for 3-leg components.
interaction_model.flip_button: inst.flipped=true. Renderer applies ctx.scale(-1,1) before drawBody(). Shown for polarized/asymmetric components.
interaction_model.zoom: 10% increments, 10%-200%. snapZoom() rounds to nearest 0.1. Scroll wheel zooms toward pointer: adjusts scrollLeft/scrollTop by (oldScroll + mouseOffset) * (newZoom/oldZoom) - mouseOffset. Right-mouse drag pans the scroll container.
interaction_model.keyboard: Space=run/stop, W=jumper mode, Del/Backspace=delete selected, +/-=zoom, Ctrl+Z=undo, Ctrl+Shift+Z/Ctrl+Y=redo, Ctrl+N/O/S=new/open/save, Ctrl+0=fit, Ctrl+D=scope, Ctrl+F=focus search, Esc=multipurpose close/cancel

simulation_engine.approach: Behavioral (not SPICE). Union-find net map → identify VCC/GND nets → per-component voltage/current solver.
simulation_engine.net_map_rules: Rows 0-4: each column internally connected. Rows 5-9: each column internally connected. Rail rows: connected horizontally within each side, broken at col 31. Wires: union the two hole keys.
simulation_engine.led_requires: vAnode - vCathode > Vf * 0.7. Finds series resistance from resistors sharing a net with LED path. I = (vAcross - Vf) / R. Brightness = clamp(I / ImA, 0, 1).
simulation_engine.working_led_circuit: power(+leg) → wire → top red rail → wire → row e col N → resistor (row e to row a, col N) → wire → LED anode (dome side) → LED cathode (flat side) → wire → bottom blue rail → power(–leg)
simulation_engine.failure_modes: over_current, over_voltage, reverse_polarity, over_power. Results: burn, explode, smoke, silent_fail. Failure stops simulation and shows overlay.

canvas_rendering.dpr_aware: initCanvas() sets canvas.width = boardWidth() * devicePixelRatio, CSS size = logical size, ctx.setTransform(dpr,0,0,dpr,0,0). All drawing code uses logical coordinates.
canvas_rendering.zoom_mechanism: CSS transform: scale(zoomLevel) on #board-transform div wrapping the canvas. eventToCanvas() divides by _zoom to get correct logical coordinates.
canvas_rendering.fitBoard: MUST use parseFloat(canvas.style.width) not canvas.width. Snaps to nearest 10%. Runs on load (setTimeout 100ms) and window resize.

css_architecture.tokens_loading: css/tokens.css loaded via <link rel='stylesheet'> in HTML head. Never @import — unreliable in Electron file:// and some server configs.
css_architecture.admin_tokens: admin/renderer/index.html has <link href='../../css/tokens.css'> BEFORE <link href='css/admin.css'>. admin.css has NO @import.

autosave_and_history.load_order: autosave.js loads BEFORE history.js in index.html. history.js calls AutoSave.save() in push() — requires AutoSave to exist first.
autosave_and_history.restore_flow: app init → History.init() → AutoSave.restore() → Board.loadLayout(parsed) → status bar message with timestamp
autosave_and_history.clear_on: newLayout(), openLayout(), confirmClear() all call AutoSave.clear() and History.clear() then History.init()

help_modal.close_button: id='help-close'. Positioned absolute top-right of #help-header. Circular button (width/height 28px, border-radius 50%). Red on hover. NOT in footer.
help_modal.footer_contents: #help-support with ko-fi link (https://ko-fi.com/circuitousfx) and #help-copyright with Circuitous FX Instagram link (https://instagram.com/circuitous.fx). No close button.

admin_tool.architecture: Single IIFE in admin/renderer/js/admin.js. All functions (readForm, openComponent, loadList, etc.) are in the same closure scope — required for duplicate button to work.
admin_tool.duplicate_button: id='btn-duplicate-component'. Calls readForm() inside IIFE, appends _copy to ID, saves new file, reloads list, selects new entry.
admin_tool.failure_modes_help: Collapsible inline block. btn-failure-help toggles failure-help-body.hidden. Explains: key (trigger name), result (burn/explode/smoke/silent_fail), threshold_multiplier (how many times over rating), message (user-facing plain English).
admin_tool.manifest_auto_update: admin/main.js updateManifest() called after every save and delete. Regenerates data/components/manifest.json.

known_issues_and_notes.3_leg_center_lead_rotation: Center lead projection math (ly sign) may render incorrectly after the component is rotated to certain angles. Needs verification with transistors rotated 90 degrees.
known_issues_and_notes.simulation_series_resistance: findSeriesResistance() is approximate — finds resistors sharing ANY net with the LED. Works for simple linear circuits but may double-count in complex topologies.
known_issues_and_notes.audio_engine: Partially stubbed. AudioEngine.isRunning() and AudioEngine.updatePotWiper() are called from properties-panel.js — ensure these exist even if stubbed.
known_issues_and_notes.oscilloscope: Oscilloscope.init() expects two canvas elements: scope-canvas and spectrum-canvas.
known_issues_and_notes.leg_span_vs_legs: leg_span = holes between OUTER legs. A 3-leg component spanning 3 holes has leg_span=2 (0 to 2). This confused implementations several times — always verify.
known_issues_and_notes.component_drag_image: palette.js buildDragImage() uses a plain 1:1 pixel canvas (no devicePixelRatio scaling). If retina scaling is added back, the setDragImage hotspot offset returns.

future_features_not_yet_implemented.implicit_power_audio_IO: Implement the implicit power and audio I/O model. Power rails are always live based on a board voltage setting. Audio Input and Output are fixed edge components always present on the board. The Signal Generator connects to Input by default. New layout dialog should ask for voltage and whether audio I/O is active.
future_features_not_yet_implemented.germanium_transistor_json: transistor_pnp.json and a separate germanium transistor JSON need model_params entries with type:'germanium' for the silver circle rendering to activate.
future_features_not_yet_implemented.ic_components: IC category exists in palette but no IC components defined yet.
future_features_not_yet_implemented.export: No schematic export or BOM export implemented.

component_json_schema.visual_fields: body_color (hex), body_width (px), body_height (px), lead_length (px, legacy — no longer used for rendering but kept for drag image sizing)
component_json_schema.behavior_type_values: resistor, capacitor, led, diode, bjt_npn, bjt_pnp, potentiometer, switch_spst, dc_supply, signal_generator, passthrough

PLACEHOLDER_current_component_json.note: INSERT ACTUAL JSON CONTENT OF EACH COMPONENT FILE HERE if needed for reference
